compiled_state.title: Write smoke test for create-bug skill output
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh that validates the /dso:create-bug skill produces template-conformant output.

### Smoke test (SC 13):
1. Verify the skill file exists and references bug-report-template.md
2. Create a ticket using the template format (as the skill instructs), with a realistic bug scenario
3. Assert the generated ticket description contains Expected Behavior and Actual Behavior headers

The test should:
- Source tests/lib/assert.sh and tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh
- Set up a temp git repo with ticket system initialized
- Create a bug ticket with a description following the template format
- Assert the description contains the required headers

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh (create)

## TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: criterion 3 — task creates test files; tests ARE the deliverable. No RED test for a test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 1 test function
  Verify: grep -c 'test_\|^test ' tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
- [ ] Smoke test asserts ticket description contains Expected Behavior and Actual Behavior headers
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-create-bug-skill-smoke.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS\|ok\|pass'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
